description: The ProtectedRoute component renders a loading spinner if permissionsLoading is true, but does NOT have a timeout. If the /api/auth/permissions endpoint hangs, the user sees a spinner forever. Add a 10-second timeout and show an error state.
successCriteria: ProtectedRoute shows an error if permissions query takes longer than 10 seconds
User can retry or refresh the page
Loading state does not hang indefinitely
